allow: Bash(node -e "const lucide = require\('lucide-react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(lucide\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('linked'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('insta'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('social'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('share'\)\); console.log\(keys.join\('\\n'\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const lucide = require\('lucide-react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(lucide\).filter\(k => !k.startsWith\('Lucide'\) && !k.endsWith\('Icon'\)\); const social = keys.filter\(k => ['Twitter','Facebook','Youtube','Github','Gitlab','Twitch','Rss','AtSign','Globe','Link','ExternalLink'].some\(s => k.includes\(s\)\)\); console.log\(social.join\('\\n'\)\);")

PowerShell($slugs = "whatsapp","instagram","facebook","tiktok","youtube","linkedin","x","telegram","gmail","googleanalytics","googleads","googledrive","googlecalendar","googlemaps","shopify","woocommerce","wordpress","mercadopago","rappi","payu","stripe","paypal","hubspot","salesforce","mailchimp","canva","notion","slack","zoom","openai","claude","anthropic","n8n","zapier","make","airtable","trello","asana","nequi","wompi","siigo","bancolombia","excel","microsoftexcel"; foreach \($s in $slugs\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://cdn.simpleicons.org/$s" -Method Head -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "$s OK" } catch { Write-Output "$s MISSING" } })
